message:
fix(security): canonicalize extension read roots before path comparison

The extension filesystem sandbox was comparing requested paths against
allowed read roots without first canonicalizing the roots themselves.
This meant symlinked or non-canonical root paths could fail the
starts_with check even when the access should be permitted, or
conversely allow bypasses through path traversal when the root
contained relative components.

Apply safe_canonicalize() to each root in the allowed_read_roots list
before comparing against the already-canonicalized requested path.
This affects all six path-check sites in the JS runtime extension
filesystem operations (readFile, readdir, stat, exists, and their
ancestor-walk fallback paths).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
